growthbook  [--agent-mode --bearer-auth --color --debug --domain --dry-run --header --include-headers --jq --no-interactive --no-update-check --output-format --password --profile --server --server-url --timeout --usage --username]
growthbook SDK-connections
growthbook SDK-connections create  [--allowed-custom-fields-in-metadata --body --encrypt-payload --environment --hash-secure-attributes --include-custom-fields-in-metadata --include-draft-experiment-refs --include-draft-experiments --include-experiment-names --include-project-id-in-metadata --include-redirect-experiments --include-rule-ids --include-tags-in-metadata --include-visual-experiments --language --name --projects --proxy-enabled --proxy-host --remote-eval-enabled --saved-group-references-enabled --sdk-version]

growthbook projects update  [--body --description --id --name --public-id --settings]
growthbook queries
growthbook queries get-query  [--id]
growthbook ramp-schedule-templates

growthbook ramp-schedules
growthbook ramp-schedules add-target  [--body --environment --feature-id --id --rule-id]
growthbook ramp-schedules api-advance  [--body --force --id --reason]
growthbook ramp-schedules approve-step  [--id]
growthbook ramp-schedules complete  [--body --disable-rule --id]
growthbook ramp-schedules create  [--body --cutoff-date --end-actions --environment --experiment-health-action --feature-id --lockdown-config --monitoring-config --name --rule-id --start-actions --start-date --steps --template-id]
growthbook ramp-schedules delete  [--id]
growthbook ramp-schedules eject-target  [--body --environment --id --rule-id --target-id]
growthbook ramp-schedules get  [--id]
growthbook ramp-schedules get-ramp-schedule-status  [--id]
growthbook ramp-schedules jump  [--body --id --target-step-index]
growthbook ramp-schedules list  [--all --feature-id --limit --max-pages --offset --status]
growthbook ramp-schedules pause  [--id]
growthbook ramp-schedules refresh-monitoring  [--id]
growthbook ramp-schedules restart  [--id]
growthbook ramp-schedules resume  [--id]
growthbook ramp-schedules rollback  [--body --id --reason]
growthbook ramp-schedules set-auto-update  [--body --enabled --id]
growthbook ramp-schedules set-monitoring-mode  [--body --id --monitoring-mode]
growthbook ramp-schedules start  [--id]
growthbook ramp-schedules update  [--body --cutoff-date --end-actions --experiment-health-action --id --lockdown-config --monitoring-config --name --start-actions --start-date --steps]

growthbook ramp-schedules update-ramp-schedule-monitoring  [--auto-update --body --datasource-id --exposure-query-id --guardrail-metric-ids --id --monitoring-mode --multiple-exposure-action --no-traffic-action --no-traffic-grace-period-hours --signal-metric-ids --srm-action --update-schedule-minutes]
growthbook ramp-schedules update-ramp-schedule-steps  [--body --id --steps]
growthbook reports
growthbook reports create  [--activation-metric --attribution-model --body --custom-metric-slices --date-ended --date-started --description --difference-type --dimension --experiment-id --goal-metrics --guardrail-metrics --lookback-override --lookback-override.date --lookback-override.window --lookback-override.window.value --lookback-override.window.value-unit --metric-overrides --query-filter --regression-adjustment-enabled --secondary-metrics --segment --sequential-testing-enabled --sequential-testing-tuning-parameter --share-level --skip-partial-data --stats-engine --title]
growthbook reports get  [--id]
growthbook reports list  [--all --experiment-id --limit --max-pages --offset]
growthbook reports refresh  [--id]
growthbook reports set-metadata  [--body --description --edit-level --id --share-level --status --title]

growthbook saved-group-revisions
growthbook saved-group-revisions add-items  [--body --items --revision-comment --revision-title --saved-group-id --version-param]
growthbook saved-group-revisions archive  [--archived --body --revision-comment --revision-title --saved-group-id --version-param]
growthbook saved-group-revisions create  [--body --comment --saved-group-id --title]
growthbook saved-group-revisions discard  [--body --reason --saved-group-id --version-param]
growthbook saved-group-revisions get  [--saved-group-id --version-param]
growthbook saved-group-revisions latest  [--mine --saved-group-id]
growthbook saved-group-revisions list  [--all --author --limit --max-pages --mine --offset --saved-group-id --skip-pagination --status]

growthbook saved-group-revisions merge-status  [--saved-group-id --version-param]
growthbook saved-group-revisions publish  [--body --merge-now --saved-group-id --version-param]
growthbook saved-group-revisions rebase  [--body --conflict-resolutions --custom-values --saved-group-id --version-param]
growthbook saved-group-revisions remove-items  [--body --items --revision-comment --revision-title --saved-group-id --version-param]
growthbook saved-group-revisions request-review  [--auto-publish-on-approval --body --saved-group-id --version-param]
growthbook saved-group-revisions revert  [--body --comment --saved-group-id --strategy --title --version-param]
growthbook saved-group-revisions set-condition  [--body --condition --revision-comment --revision-title --saved-group-id --version-param]
growthbook saved-group-revisions set-metadata  [--body --description --name --owner --projects --revision-comment --revision-title --saved-group-id --version-param]
growthbook saved-group-revisions set-values  [--body --revision-comment --revision-title --saved-group-id --values --version-param]
growthbook saved-group-revisions submit-review  [--body --comment --decision --saved-group-id --skip-auto-publish --version-param]
